rationale: Educ. Code §37.104 governs municipal court jurisdiction over criminal cases involving school district property violations. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The judge of a municipal court of a municipality in which, or any justice of the peace of a county in which, property under the control and jurisdiction of a school district is located may hear and determine criminal cases involving violations of this subchapter or rules adopted under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to court jurisdiction, not property tax exemptions.
